messages.content: What is the capital of France?
<think>France is a country in Europe. Its capital city is Paris.</think>The capital of France is Paris.
<think>7 times 8 is the same as 7 added 8 times, which equals 56.</think>7 times 8 is 56.
<think>17 is only divisible by 1 and itself, so it has no other factors.</think>Yes, 17 is a prime number.
If a train travels 60 km in 2 hours, what is its speed?
<think>Speed equals distance divided by time, so 60 divided by 2 is 30.</think>The train's speed is 30 km/h.
<think>3/4 = 0.75 and 2/3 is about 0.667, so 3/4 is larger.</think>3/4 is larger than 2/3.
